description: Detects excessive includes, parameter overload, and low method cohesion in C++. Simplified from Rust: flags all preproc_include nodes (info severity) without threshold counting, parameter count checks, or method cohesion (this-reference) analysis. No cross-function reference counting in JSON DSL. Precision reduced -- every include directive is flagged.

flag.message: #include directive detected -- review if all dependencies are necessary; high coupling increases compile times and reduces modularity
